_comment: Roster template for the convergence study. Exact model id strings, the
host serving each open-weight model, and the run date are pinned at lock
(PRE_REGISTRATION_CONVERGENCE.md, Roster). Entries whose model id starts
with PIN_AT_LOCK are placeholders; the runner refuses to run them.
Anthropic ids are prefilled from the known current lineup and are still
confirmed at lock like everything else.
Fields: model (id sent on the wire), provider (key into
providers.PROVIDERS), arms (A reasoning off, B reasoning on; google is
B-only), host (open-weight models: who serves it, plus any quantization
string the host reports; null for closed first-party APIs),
temperature_mode ('send' = temperature 1.0 in the body, 'omit' = no
temperature key; pinned per model, recorded per row as temperature_sent;
never 0, the measurement depends on natural sampling variance),
thinking_on (anthropic Arm B only: the thinking config to send).
Anthropic temperature_mode is omit on the faithful harness's Q3
precedent: 4.7+ deprecated the parameter and the API default is 1.0,
which satisfies the sampling requirement; resolved at lock as omit.
Temperature rule (locked Jul 24 2026): send only where the parameter
is documented-effective on the non-thinking arm (deepseek, zai). On
thinking arms the same sent value is documented-ignored (deepseek)
or unconfirmed (zai); rows record temperature_sent with that
annotation. omit wherever the parameter is rejected (openai gpt-5.x,
anthropic post-4.7), removed (gemini 3.5+/3.6), or unverifiable
within design constraints (gemini-3.1-pro thinking arm).
Non-greedy default sampling on every surface is verified at smoke
via a sampling-variance probe: identical duplicate calls per model
per arm must produce differing outputs.
gemini-3.1-pro-preview is a preview id. The per-row model id echo
is the aliasing tripwire: if the echoed id changes mid-collection,
halt; completed rows form their own cell. google collects first.

models.host: deepseek first-party API (api.deepseek.com); record served precision if reported
deepseek first-party API (api.deepseek.com); record served precision if reported
z.ai first-party API (api.z.ai); record served precision if reported
